violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. Ziplock bag of raw chicken placed on top of ziplock bags of raw ground beef and bags of ready to eat deli meat.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Handle of the tongs in the chips and handle of ice scoop in the bar area were stored in the food product.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Bag of chicken being thawed on the bottom shelf of a prep table. Needs to be thawed under cold running water or under refrigeration.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelving in the bar area is made of particle board and is not a non-absorbent cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Inside of the ice dispenser bin needs to be cleaned.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave in the kitchen needs to be cleaned.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Employees are washing hands in a warewash sink. Hand washing must be done in a designated hand wash sink.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Hand sink in the kitchen did not having running water at the time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors behind and under the kitchen equipment needs to be cleaned.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
